name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Initialize Codex projects, choose and clean up runtime working roots, preserve versioned private project state, review local chat logs, and manage sessions, decisions, memos, global context, freshness, and distillation.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize projects, maintain private state, and reuse durable context
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for project initialization through .tkn/codex-context.yaml, versioned private context under ~/.tkn/codex-context, runtime working-root selection, legacy context migration, working dashboards, sessions, decisions, memos, chat review, distillation, freshness audits, read-only loading, snapshot import, and explicit promotion.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repository in the private Codex context registry
Use the right Codex working root before installing Python or Node dependencies
Resume an existing project session note
